title: Schoenoplectiella lateriflora
taxonomy: Schoenoplectiella lateriflora is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is a member of the genus Schoenoplectiella and the subfamily Cyperoideae. The plant is classified under the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Liliopsida, and order Poales. Schoenoplectiella lateriflora is further classified into the family Cyperaceae, which includes various types of sedges and rushes. At the species level, it is a distinct member of the genus Schoenoplectiella.
